message:
Fix tab reopen, focus already-open files, and restore focus after tab close

- closeTab now also removes the panel from session and notifies the
  extension Panel instance via onPanelClosed so it marks itself disposed
- openTab prevents duplicate tabs for the same panel
- Files extension detects disposed panels and creates fresh ones on reopen
- files.open returns panelId; command palette and diff view use it to
  request focus via a client-side event bus (tab-focus.ts)
- Add usePanelFocus hook so panel components (terminal, editor) register
  focus handlers that get called on tab activation and after tab close
- Capture focus-in-tabs flag before calling api.close() since dockview
  blurs the element before onDidRemovePanel fires
- Add ExtensionPanelProps.id so panel components know their panel ID

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/mwvt82j9v8x3nu878kd5dn5c
